examples: Premature birth is the main cause of perinatal mortality.
Preterm birth is an important perinatal health problem across the globe.
Perinatal depression and anxiety are prevalent in women in northern Viet Nam.
English is alive with such Greco-Latin mongrels as amoral, biodiversity, hypermarket, inorganic, perinatal, television.
Perinatal depression is a term used to describe depression before or after the birth of a baby.
